name: The suffering servant
notes: This is Isaiah's prophecy of the suffering servant (Isa 53:7-8), the very scripture the Ethiopian eunuch was reading when Philip joined him. Acts 8:32-33 quotes the passage directly and Philip preached Jesus to him beginning at that same scripture, applying the servant to Christ. Isa 53:7 answers to Acts 8:32 in the figure of the lamb led to the slaughter, dumb before the shearer, opening not his mouth; Isa 53:8 answers to Acts 8:33 in his judgment taken away and the question who shall declare his generation. The small differences in wording arise from the Greek rendering quoted in Acts, and are left as a matter for further study.

links.label: a lamb ... to the slaughter ... dumb ... not his mouth
